_meta.source: Transplant patient support services rubric (manually curated)
_meta.notes: L-022 fix: Replaced wealth-correlated scores with transplant-support rubric. Scored on: patient housing (30%), financial assistance (25%), transplant support groups (20%), caregiver resources (15%), health literacy (10%). Based on research of each center's dedicated transplant housing, financial aid programs, peer support, caregiver programs.
